TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_nipaluma-timyu, title = nipaluma-timyu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/nipaluma-timyu} }

S.FORM: == timyu == masadumaay a ngangan Cordyline fruticosa Chev. (mitesekay a ngangan)Cordyline fruticosa Chev. ťĺćŤąĆŤė≠ÁßĎ(Agavaceae) (sapamataan a ngangan)Agavaceae śúĪŤēČŚĪ¨ (mikeliday tu ngangan)Timyu a mikeliday (tada ngangan)hong-zhu, zi-qiannian-mu, zhu-zhu, tie-shu, qiannian-mu Common Dracena,Tree of Ings (igu a ngangan)Common Dracena,Tree of Ings ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Bunbun Ikit,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Timyo,ťĄí Tanvn Varavana (kamu nu binacadan)Bunun Bunbun Ikit, Sakidaya Timyo, Co Tanvn Varavana ŚłÉŤĺ≤,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ,ťĄí (mitaduay nu binacadan)Bunun, Sakidaya, Co kaliwasak nu langaw Timya u hong-zhu, zi-qiannian-mu, tie-shu a nganganan, i kacaledesan nu yazhou,Taipingyang nu subalan, Aozhuo atu kacaledesan nu Meizhou a kitidaan, manamuh i cilalcilalan a maudip, itini i Taywan sipaluma i liklik nu lumalumaan nu aadihan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) sasapayuan papah inai ku sanek. papah mibakah tu akuti' nu udip, pakasapi' tu idang, pakasaluimeng tu idang, nika tunatun, pasaluimeng tu adada, u'hu'h, nananumen, mikapah tunika sidinget. balu han mipuu'd tu idang, mibakah tu teluhu', supa', ka tahekal nu idang a mamenahan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) milihida tu langaw musakamu Timyo u long-she-lan-ke a Timyo nu yadahay a mihcaan nanay nu langdaw nu papah apuyuay nu langawan, talakaw nu langaw han makaala tu 1.5 congchyy. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) cacay ku batac cacay ku papah, wayway nu papah kibetul a tudi malecad ku kaku tunika sadit nu madicemay atu satanayu' sananay nu mamucuya a papahan, tanayu' makaala tu siwa~ sabaw tu enem a congfen, kulit nu papah caay namin kalecad, idaw ku langdaway, kala sumasumanahan, lumeni' ku kiyukiyuan atu kala sumasumanahan atu teban nu kalalaan a kulitan, papah nu akaway han tanayu' makaala tu cacay a bataan~ sepat a bataan a congfen. sadingsing yadah kunika cebalan tu langdaway, sanglacay, kalawlawan, sumanahay atu kiyukiyuan a adidiay nu baluan, nika cebalan nu balu i akaway siciit aca, nika babenisan nu akawaya nu baluhan siadidiay a baluan, nika cebal nu baluan masadicem. mabadi' satu ku balu siheci tu mahidaay u mali a sumanahay a sikabiay nu hecian. timyo u tianmen-dong-ke mikeliday nu langawan, duma a ngangan han u sumanahay nu papah a Tie-shuan. yadahay a mihcaan nanay a langdaw nu papah apuyuay nu langawan, nikaliwsak nu langaw i zhongguo, yindu atu kacaledesan nu yazhou. talakaw makaala tu cacay ~tusa a chyy, papah mapulun i akawayan nu tunduh, masasuala a sipapah, papah nu tabaki adidi u langaw ku han caay namin kalecad, papah nu kulit, sulit nu langw caaya tu kalecad, nipalumaan nu palumaay yadah ku caaya kalecad nu langawan, makaala tu tusa a bataan ku langawan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: ťęėÁīĄ 1-2 Śįļ, .) timyo u sasapayuantu ku langaw, duma u balu, papah, lamit u sasapayuen namin, zhongguo nu binawlan sipingaay tu idang, idang nu isi', jun-li adadaan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) naw kitidaan u kamu nu Hulam sa: . zhongguo Dalu Huanan, Ximalaya-shan, Yindu, Ma-liujia, Malaixiya, Aozhou, atu taipingyang a subalan nu kacaledesan a kitidaan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) kaliwasak (u kamu nu Hulam sa: . Taywan namaka cacay a malebut walu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku lima a mihcaan namaka Guangdong nipatayni paluma, ayda han i likliksa nu lumalumaan paluma tu aadihan. sasahican 1.ikabing atu liwliw nu luma nipaluma tu aadihan, kapahany nu aadihan tu papah a langawan, maadih ita i lumalumaan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) 2.sasapayuan kasisapayuan papah idaw ku Fen-lei,Anjisuan, waneng. mingaay tu muta' tu idang, balec, haykikac, bituka katahekal nu idanga, sawada' nikatahekalan nu idang, siidang ku isi, siidang ku tai', tadayadah ku bulad, adada ku atay, mabanic, malaliya, zipanbing, lebawa. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) tatapangan langdaway nu apuyuay a kilangan, patelek, talakaw nu langaw han makaala tu cacay ~tusa a congchyy, tabaki ku tatapangan cacay ~ tulu a congfen, alahican siciit. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) papah papah mapulung i angangan nu tunduh, malecad ku kakau, cacay ku batac cacay kupapah, wayway nu papah sadicemsa atu mamucuya kunika diceman, caay kalecad ku tabaki nu papahan u langaw kuhan , tanayu makaala tu tusa a bataan idaw kulima ~ lima a bataan a congfen, ahebal han lima ~ cacay a bataan a congfen. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: ,ťē∑ 25~50 ŚÖ¨ŚąÜ,ŚĮ¨ 5~10 ŚÖ¨ŚąÜ.) kulit nu papah caay namin kalecad, idaw ku langdaway, kala sumasumanahan, lumeni' ku kiyukiyuan atu kala sumasumanahan atu teban nu kalalaan a kulitan, masadid ku hekal nu papah, teban nu akaway ka tinengan ku sulit, malecad ku kakum kibetul, idaw ku akaway tanayu'han makaala tu lima ~lima a bataan a congfen, papah nu akaway idaw ku masalebungay, tanayu han makaala tu cacay a bataan ~ tulu a bataan a congfen, lamit ahebal miliwliw tu tatapangan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: ,śäĪŤéĖ.) balu papah nu sasaan yadah ku langdaway a kulitan, sanglacay a kulitan atu kala lawlawan ku kulit, sumanahay a kulit, kiyukiyuan a kulitan nu adidiay a baluan, sadicem sa kunika cebalan nu balu, kacebalan nu balu a dicem han makaala tu tulu a bataan ~enem a bataan a congfen, tepal nu lamitan idaw ku tabakiay satabu, nubaluan idaw ku tuluay nu satabu. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: 3 śěöŤčěÁČá.) balu kala sumasumanahan, langdaw kiyukiyuan ku kulit katukuh tu kalawlawan a kulitan, tanayu' han cacay a congfen, balu nu akaway aapuyu, inai ku tanayuay nu 0.3~0.4 congfen. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: 0.3~0.4 ŚÖ¨ŚąÜ.) hekal miliwliway tu balu a belih nu sasaay midepit tu labu malatankunga, nika cebalan tu pabaw han pasayda i hekal mungangu atu micubelis aca kuni ka cebalan nu balu, tamaan nu baluan i takulaw nu tankungaan, apuyu ibelih nu balu, balu nu akaway satanayu' sa . kasibaluan han i sabaw tu cacay a bulat katukuh tu sakatusa a mihcaan nu tuluay a buladan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: 3 śúą.) heci heci mahida u mali sikabi, maduhem satu sumanah. Papah mapulung i tatapangan atu akaway nu pabawan, kala mulmulan tu mamucuya ku dicem, langdaway ku kulit atu kala kiyuan ku sumanah. nipalumaan yadah kuma hicaay nu langawan, makaala tu tusa a bataan ku pina, mahida u sumanahay ku lilis nu Timyo, adidiay nu sumanahay, langdaway nu papahan a Timyo, zi-qiannian-mu. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay
S.PHON: == timju == masadumaaj a ŇčaŇčan ¶ordjr~…ĺin…ô fruti ¶osa ¶ńß…ô*. (mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan) ¶ordjr~…ĺin…ô fruti ¶osa ¶ńß…ô*. ****(aga*a ¶…ôa…ô) (sapamataan a ŇčaŇčan)aga*a ¶…ôa…ô *** (mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu ŇčaŇčan)timju a mik…ôr~…ĺidaj (tada ŇčaŇčan)ńßoŇč-zńßu, zi-*iannian-mu, zńßu-zńßu, ti…ô-sńßu, *iannian-mu ¶ommon dra ¶…ôna,tr…ô…ô of iŇčs (igu a ŇčaŇčan) ¶ommon dra ¶…ôna,tr…ô…ô of iŇčs ** bunbun ikit,**** timjo,* tan*n *ara*ana (kamu nu bina ¶adan)bunun bunbun ikit, sakidaja timjo, ¶o tan*n *ara*ana **,****,* (mitaduaj nu bina ¶adan)bunun, sakidaja, ¶o kar~…ĺiwasak nu r~…ĺaŇčaw timja u ńßoŇč-zńßu, zi-*iannian-mu, ti…ô-sńßu a ŇčaŇčanan, i ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan nu jazńßou,taipiŇčjaŇč nu subar~…ĺan, aozńßuo atu ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan nu m…ôizńßou a kitidaan, manamuńß i ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺan a maudip, itini i tajwan sipar~…ĺuma i r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu r~…ĺumar~…ĺumaan nu aadińßan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) sasapajuan papańß inai ku san…ôk. papańß mibakańß tu akuti Ē~ ° nu udip, pakasapi Ē~ ° tu idaŇč, pakasar~…ĺuim…ôŇč tu idaŇč, nika tunatun, pasar~…ĺuim…ôŇč tu adada, u Ē~ °ńßu Ē~ °ńß, nananum…ôn, mikapańß tunika sidiŇč…ôt. bar~…ĺu ńßan mipuu Ē~ °d tu idaŇč, mibakańß tu t…ôr~…ĺuńßu Ē~ °, supa Ē~ °, ka tańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu idaŇč a mam…ônańßan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) mir~…ĺińßida tu r~…ĺaŇčaw musakamu timjo u r~…ĺoŇč-sńß…ô-r~…ĺan-k…ô a timjo nu jadańßaj a mińß ¶aan nanaj nu r~…ĺaŇčdaw nu papańß apujuaj nu r~…ĺaŇčawan, tar~…ĺakaw nu r~…ĺaŇčaw ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu *.* ¶oŇč ¶ńßjj. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) ¶a ¶aj ku bata ¶ ¶a ¶aj ku papańß, wajwaj nu papańß kib…ôtur~…ĺ a tudi mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kaku tunika sadit nu madi ¶…ômaj atu satanaju Ē~ ° sananaj nu mamu ¶uja a papańßan, tanaju Ē~ ° makaar~…ĺa tu siwa~ sabaw tu …ôn…ôm a ¶oŇčf…ôn, kur~…ĺit nu papańß ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, idaw ku r~…ĺaŇčdawaj, kar~…ĺa sumasumanańßan, r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° ku kijukijuan atu kar~…ĺa sumasumanańßan atu t…ôban nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺaan a kur~…ĺitan, papańß nu akawaj ńßan tanaju Ē~ ° makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan~ s…ôpat a bataan a ¶oŇčf…ôn. sadiŇčsiŇč jadańß kunika ¶…ôbar~…ĺan tu r~…ĺaŇčdawaj, saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj, kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan, sumanańßaj atu kijukijuan a adidiaj nu bar~…ĺuan, nika ¶…ôbar~…ĺan nu bar~…ĺu i akawaj si ¶iit a ¶a, nika bab…ônisan nu akawaja nu bar~…ĺuńßan siadidiaj a bar~…ĺuan, nika ¶…ôbar~…ĺ nu bar~…ĺuan masadi ¶…ôm. mabadi Ē~ ° satu ku bar~…ĺu sińß…ô ¶i tu mańßidaaj u mar~…ĺi a sumanańßaj a sikabiaj nu ńß…ô ¶ian. timjo u tianm…ôn-doŇč-k…ô mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu r~…ĺaŇčawan, duma a ŇčaŇčan ńßan u sumanańßaj nu papańß a ti…ô-sńßuan. jadańßaj a mińß ¶aan nanaj a r~…ĺaŇčdaw nu papańß apujuaj nu r~…ĺaŇčawan, nikar~…ĺiwsak nu r~…ĺaŇčaw i zńßoŇčguo, jindu atu ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan nu jazńßou. tar~…ĺakaw makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj ~tusa a ¶ńßjj, papańß mapur~…ĺun i akawajan nu tunduńß, masasuar~…ĺa a sipapańß, papańß nu tabaki adidi u r~…ĺaŇčaw ku ńßan ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, papańß nu kur~…ĺit, sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺaŇčw ¶aaja tu kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, nipar~…ĺumaan nu par~…ĺumaaj jadańß ku ¶aaja kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu r~…ĺaŇčawan, makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a bataan ku r~…ĺaŇčawan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ** *-* *, .) timjo u sasapajuantu ku r~…ĺaŇčaw, duma u bar~…ĺu, papańß, r~…ĺamit u sasapaju…ôn namin, zńßoŇčguo nu binawr~…ĺan sipiŇčaaj tu idaŇč, idaŇč nu isi Ē~ °, jun-r~…ĺi adadaan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) naw kitidaan u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: . zńßoŇčguo dar~…ĺu ńßuanan, *imar~…ĺaja-sńßan, jindu, ma-r~…ĺiujia, mar~…ĺai*ija, aozńßou, atu taipiŇčjaŇč a subar~…ĺan nu ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan a kitidaan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) kar~…ĺiwasak (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: . tajwan namaka ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan namaka guaŇčdoŇč nipatajni par~…ĺuma, ajda ńßan i r~…ĺikr~…ĺiksa nu r~…ĺumar~…ĺumaan par~…ĺuma tu aadińßan. sasańßi ¶an *.ikabiŇč atu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu r~…ĺuma nipar~…ĺuma tu aadińßan, kapańßanj nu aadińßan tu papańß a r~…ĺaŇčawan, maadińß ita i r~…ĺumar~…ĺumaan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) *.sasapajuan kasisapajuan papańß idaw ku f…ôn-r~…ĺ…ôi,anjisuan, wan…ôŇč. miŇčaaj tu muta Ē~ ° tu idaŇč, bar~…ĺ…ô ¶, ńßajkika ¶, bituka katańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu idaŇča, sawada Ē~ ° nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nu idaŇč, siidaŇč ku isi, siidaŇč ku tai Ē~ °, tadajadańß ku bur~…ĺad, adada ku ataj, mabani ¶, mar~…ĺar~…ĺija, zipanbiŇč, r~…ĺ…ôbawa. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) tatapaŇčan r~…ĺaŇčdawaj nu apujuaj a kir~…ĺaŇčan, pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk, tar~…ĺakaw nu r~…ĺaŇčaw ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj ~tusa a ¶oŇč ¶ńßjj, tabaki ku tatapaŇčan ¶a ¶aj ~ tur~…ĺu a ¶oŇčf…ôn, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an si ¶iit. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) papańß papańß mapur~…ĺuŇč i aŇčaŇčan nu tunduńß, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kakau, ¶a ¶aj ku bata ¶ ¶a ¶aj kupapańß, wajwaj nu papańß sadi ¶…ômsa atu mamu ¶uja kunika di ¶…ôman, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku tabaki nu papańßan u r~…ĺaŇčaw kuńßan , tanaju makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a bataan idaw kur~…ĺima ~ r~…ĺima a bataan a ¶oŇčf…ôn, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ńßan r~…ĺima ~ ¶a ¶aj a bataan a ¶oŇčf…ôn. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ,* **~** **,* *~** **.) kur~…ĺit nu papańß ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, idaw ku r~…ĺaŇčdawaj, kar~…ĺa sumasumanańßan, r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° ku kijukijuan atu kar~…ĺa sumasumanańßan atu t…ôban nu kar~…ĺar~…ĺaan a kur~…ĺitan, masadid ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu papańß, t…ôban nu akawaj ka tin…ôŇčan ku sur~…ĺit, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kakum kib…ôtur~…ĺ, idaw ku akawaj tanaju Ē~ °ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima ~r~…ĺima a bataan a ¶oŇčf…ôn, papańß nu akawaj idaw ku masar~…ĺ…ôbuŇčaj, tanaju ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan ~ tur~…ĺu a bataan a ¶oŇčf…ôn, r~…ĺamit ańß…ôbar~…ĺ mir~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw tu tatapaŇčan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ,**.) bar~…ĺu papańß nu sasaan jadańß ku r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a kur~…ĺitan, saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a kur~…ĺitan atu kar~…ĺa r~…ĺawr~…ĺawan ku kur~…ĺit, sumanańßaj a kur~…ĺit, kijukijuan a kur~…ĺitan nu adidiaj a bar~…ĺuan, sadi ¶…ôm sa kunika ¶…ôbar~…ĺan nu bar~…ĺu, ka ¶…ôbar~…ĺan nu bar~…ĺu a di ¶…ôm ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺu a bataan ~…ôn…ôm a bataan a ¶oŇčf…ôn, t…ôpar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺamitan idaw ku tabakiaj satabu, nubar~…ĺuan idaw ku tur~…ĺuaj nu satabu. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: * ***.) bar~…ĺu kar~…ĺa sumasumanańßan, r~…ĺaŇčdaw kijukijuan ku kur~…ĺit katukuńß tu kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan a kur~…ĺitan, tanaju Ē~ ° ńßan ¶a ¶aj a ¶oŇčf…ôn, bar~…ĺu nu akawaj aapuju, inai ku tanajuaj nu *.*~*.* ¶oŇčf…ôn. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: *.*~*.* **.) ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mir~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwaj tu bar~…ĺu a b…ôr~…ĺińß nu sasaaj mid…ôpit tu r~…ĺabu mar~…ĺatankuŇča, nika ¶…ôbar~…ĺan tu pabaw ńßan pasajda i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ muŇčaŇču atu mi ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis a ¶a kuni ka ¶…ôbar~…ĺan nu bar~…ĺu, tamaan nu bar~…ĺuan i takur~…ĺaw nu tankuŇčaan, apuju ib…ôr~…ĺińß nu bar~…ĺu, bar~…ĺu nu akawaj satanaju Ē~ ° sa . kasibar~…ĺuan ńßan i sabaw tu ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺat katukuńß tu sakatusa a mińß ¶aan nu tur~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺadan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: * *.) ńß…ô ¶i ńß…ô ¶i mańßida u mar~…ĺi sikabi, maduńß…ôm satu sumanańß. papańß mapur~…ĺuŇč i tatapaŇčan atu akawaj nu pabawan, kar~…ĺa mur~…ĺmur~…ĺan tu mamu ¶uja ku di ¶…ôm, r~…ĺaŇčdawaj ku kur~…ĺit atu kar~…ĺa kijuan ku sumanańß. nipar~…ĺumaan jadańß kuma ńßi ¶aaj nu r~…ĺaŇčawan, makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a bataan ku pina, mańßida u sumanańßaj ku r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu timjo, adidiaj nu sumanańßaj, r~…ĺaŇčdawaj nu papańßan a timjo, zi-*iannian-mu. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj
S.FORM: == timyu == masadumaay a ngangan Cordyline fruticosa Chev. (mitesekay a ngangan)Cordyline fruticosa Chev. ťĺćŤąĆŤė≠ÁßĎ(Agavaceae) (sapamataan a ngangan)Agavaceae śúĪŤēČŚĪ¨ (mikeliday tu ngangan)Timyu a mikeliday (tada ngangan)hong-zhu, zi-qiannian-mu, zhu-zhu, tie-shu, qiannian-mu Common Dracena,Tree of Ings (igu a ngangan)Common Dracena,Tree of Ings ŚłÉŤĺ≤ Bunbun Ikit,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ Timyo,ťĄí Tanvn Varavana (kamu nu binacadan)Bunun Bunbun Ikit, Sakidaya Timyo, Co Tanvn Varavana ŚłÉŤĺ≤,śííŚ•áŤźäťõÖ,ťĄí (mitaduay nu binacadan)Bunun, Sakidaya, Co kaliwasak nu langaw Timya u hong-zhu, zi-qiannian-mu, tie-shu a nganganan, i kacaledesan nu yazhou,Taipingyang nu subalan, Aozhuo atu kacaledesan nu Meizhou a kitidaan, manamuh i cilalcilalan a maudip, itini i Taywan sipaluma i liklik nu lumalumaan nu aadihan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) sasapayuan papah inai ku sanek. papah mibakah tu akuti' nu udip, pakasapi' tu idang, pakasaluimeng tu idang, nika tunatun, pasaluimeng tu adada, u'hu'h, nananumen, mikapah tunika sidinget. balu han mipuu'd tu idang, mibakah tu teluhu', supa', ka tahekal nu idang a mamenahan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) milihida tu langaw musakamu Timyo u long-she-lan-ke a Timyo nu yadahay a mihcaan nanay nu langdaw nu papah apuyuay nu langawan, talakaw nu langaw han makaala tu 1.5 congchyy. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) cacay ku batac cacay ku papah, wayway nu papah kibetul a tudi malecad ku kaku tunika sadit nu madicemay atu satanayu' sananay nu mamucuya a papahan, tanayu' makaala tu siwa~ sabaw tu enem a congfen, kulit nu papah caay namin kalecad, idaw ku langdaway, kala sumasumanahan, lumeni' ku kiyukiyuan atu kala sumasumanahan atu teban nu kalalaan a kulitan, papah nu akaway han tanayu' makaala tu cacay a bataan~ sepat a bataan a congfen. sadingsing yadah kunika cebalan tu langdaway, sanglacay, kalawlawan, sumanahay atu kiyukiyuan a adidiay nu baluan, nika cebalan nu balu i akaway siciit aca, nika babenisan nu akawaya nu baluhan siadidiay a baluan, nika cebal nu baluan masadicem. mabadi' satu ku balu siheci tu mahidaay u mali a sumanahay a sikabiay nu hecian. timyo u tianmen-dong-ke mikeliday nu langawan, duma a ngangan han u sumanahay nu papah a Tie-shuan. yadahay a mihcaan nanay a langdaw nu papah apuyuay nu langawan, nikaliwsak nu langaw i zhongguo, yindu atu kacaledesan nu yazhou. talakaw makaala tu cacay ~tusa a chyy, papah mapulun i akawayan nu tunduh, masasuala a sipapah, papah nu tabaki adidi u langaw ku han caay namin kalecad, papah nu kulit, sulit nu langw caaya tu kalecad, nipalumaan nu palumaay yadah ku caaya kalecad nu langawan, makaala tu tusa a bataan ku langawan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: ťęėÁīĄ 1-2 Śįļ, .) timyo u sasapayuantu ku langaw, duma u balu, papah, lamit u sasapayuen namin, zhongguo nu binawlan sipingaay tu idang, idang nu isi', jun-li adadaan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) naw kitidaan u kamu nu Hulam sa: . zhongguo Dalu Huanan, Ximalaya-shan, Yindu, Ma-liujia, Malaixiya, Aozhou, atu taipingyang a subalan nu kacaledesan a kitidaan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) kaliwasak (u kamu nu Hulam sa: . Taywan namaka cacay a malebut walu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku lima a mihcaan namaka Guangdong nipatayni paluma, ayda han i likliksa nu lumalumaan paluma tu aadihan. sasahican 1.ikabing atu liwliw nu luma nipaluma tu aadihan, kapahany nu aadihan tu papah a langawan, maadih ita i lumalumaan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) 2.sasapayuan kasisapayuan papah idaw ku Fen-lei,Anjisuan, waneng. mingaay tu muta' tu idang, balec, haykikac, bituka katahekal nu idanga, sawada' nikatahekalan nu idang, siidang ku isi, siidang ku tai', tadayadah ku bulad, adada ku atay, mabanic, malaliya, zipanbing, lebawa. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) tatapangan langdaway nu apuyuay a kilangan, patelek, talakaw nu langaw han makaala tu cacay ~tusa a congchyy, tabaki ku tatapangan cacay ~ tulu a congfen, alahican siciit. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) papah papah mapulung i angangan nu tunduh, malecad ku kakau, cacay ku batac cacay kupapah, wayway nu papah sadicemsa atu mamucuya kunika diceman, caay kalecad ku tabaki nu papahan u langaw kuhan , tanayu makaala tu tusa a bataan idaw kulima ~ lima a bataan a congfen, ahebal han lima ~ cacay a bataan a congfen. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: ,ťē∑ 25~50 ŚÖ¨ŚąÜ,ŚĮ¨ 5~10 ŚÖ¨ŚąÜ.) kulit nu papah caay namin kalecad, idaw ku langdaway, kala sumasumanahan, lumeni' ku kiyukiyuan atu kala sumasumanahan atu teban nu kalalaan a kulitan, masadid ku hekal nu papah, teban nu akaway ka tinengan ku sulit, malecad ku kakum kibetul, idaw ku akaway tanayu'han makaala tu lima ~lima a bataan a congfen, papah nu akaway idaw ku masalebungay, tanayu han makaala tu cacay a bataan ~ tulu a bataan a congfen, lamit ahebal miliwliw tu tatapangan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: ,śäĪŤéĖ.) balu papah nu sasaan yadah ku langdaway a kulitan, sanglacay a kulitan atu kala lawlawan ku kulit, sumanahay a kulit, kiyukiyuan a kulitan nu adidiay a baluan, sadicem sa kunika cebalan nu balu, kacebalan nu balu a dicem han makaala tu tulu a bataan ~enem a bataan a congfen, tepal nu lamitan idaw ku tabakiay satabu, nubaluan idaw ku tuluay nu satabu. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: 3 śěöŤčěÁČá.) balu kala sumasumanahan, langdaw kiyukiyuan ku kulit katukuh tu kalawlawan a kulitan, tanayu' han cacay a congfen, balu nu akaway aapuyu, inai ku tanayuay nu 0.3~0.4 congfen. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: 0.3~0.4 ŚÖ¨ŚąÜ.) hekal miliwliway tu balu a belih nu sasaay midepit tu labu malatankunga, nika cebalan tu pabaw han pasayda i hekal mungangu atu micubelis aca kuni ka cebalan nu balu, tamaan nu baluan i takulaw nu tankungaan, apuyu ibelih nu balu, balu nu akaway satanayu' sa . kasibaluan han i sabaw tu cacay a bulat katukuh tu sakatusa a mihcaan nu tuluay a buladan. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: 3 śúą.) heci heci mahida u mali sikabi, maduhem satu sumanah. Papah mapulung i tatapangan atu akaway nu pabawan, kala mulmulan tu mamucuya ku dicem, langdaway ku kulit atu kala kiyuan ku sumanah. nipalumaan yadah kuma hicaay nu langawan, makaala tu tusa a bataan ku pina, mahida u sumanahay ku lilis nu Timyo, adidiay nu sumanahay, langdaway nu papahan a Timyo, zi-qiannian-mu. (u kamu nu Hulam sa: .) u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay
S.PHON: == timju == masadumaaj a ŇčaŇčan ¶ordjr~…ĺin…ô fruti ¶osa ¶ńß…ô*. (mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan) ¶ordjr~…ĺin…ô fruti ¶osa ¶ńß…ô*. ****(aga*a ¶…ôa…ô) (sapamataan a ŇčaŇčan)aga*a ¶…ôa…ô *** (mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu ŇčaŇčan)timju a mik…ôr~…ĺidaj (tada ŇčaŇčan)ńßoŇč-zńßu, zi-*iannian-mu, zńßu-zńßu, ti…ô-sńßu, *iannian-mu ¶ommon dra ¶…ôna,tr…ô…ô of iŇčs (igu a ŇčaŇčan) ¶ommon dra ¶…ôna,tr…ô…ô of iŇčs ** bunbun ikit,**** timjo,* tan*n *ara*ana (kamu nu bina ¶adan)bunun bunbun ikit, sakidaja timjo, ¶o tan*n *ara*ana **,****,* (mitaduaj nu bina ¶adan)bunun, sakidaja, ¶o kar~…ĺiwasak nu r~…ĺaŇčaw timja u ńßoŇč-zńßu, zi-*iannian-mu, ti…ô-sńßu a ŇčaŇčanan, i ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan nu jazńßou,taipiŇčjaŇč nu subar~…ĺan, aozńßuo atu ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan nu m…ôizńßou a kitidaan, manamuńß i ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺan a maudip, itini i tajwan sipar~…ĺuma i r~…ĺikr~…ĺik nu r~…ĺumar~…ĺumaan nu aadińßan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) sasapajuan papańß inai ku san…ôk. papańß mibakańß tu akuti Ē~ ° nu udip, pakasapi Ē~ ° tu idaŇč, pakasar~…ĺuim…ôŇč tu idaŇč, nika tunatun, pasar~…ĺuim…ôŇč tu adada, u Ē~ °ńßu Ē~ °ńß, nananum…ôn, mikapańß tunika sidiŇč…ôt. bar~…ĺu ńßan mipuu Ē~ °d tu idaŇč, mibakańß tu t…ôr~…ĺuńßu Ē~ °, supa Ē~ °, ka tańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu idaŇč a mam…ônańßan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: ,**.) bar~…ĺu papańß nu sasaan jadańß ku r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a kur~…ĺitan, saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a kur~…ĺitan atu kar~…ĺa r~…ĺawr~…ĺawan ku kur~…ĺit, sumanańßaj a kur~…ĺit, kijukijuan a kur~…ĺitan nu adidiaj a bar~…ĺuan, sadi ¶…ôm sa kunika ¶…ôbar~…ĺan nu bar~…ĺu, ka ¶…ôbar~…ĺan nu bar~…ĺu a di ¶…ôm ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺu a bataan ~…ôn…ôm a bataan a ¶oŇčf…ôn, t…ôpar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺamitan idaw ku tabakiaj satabu, nubar~…ĺuan idaw ku tur~…ĺuaj nu satabu. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: * ***.) bar~…ĺu kar~…ĺa sumasumanańßan, r~…ĺaŇčdaw kijukijuan ku kur~…ĺit katukuńß tu kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan a kur~…ĺitan, tanaju Ē~ ° ńßan ¶a ¶aj a ¶oŇčf…ôn, bar~…ĺu nu akawaj aapuju, inai ku tanajuaj nu *.*~*.* ¶oŇčf…ôn. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: *.*~*.* **.) ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mir~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwaj tu bar~…ĺu a b…ôr~…ĺińß nu sasaaj mid…ôpit tu r~…ĺabu mar~…ĺatankuŇča, nika ¶…ôbar~…ĺan tu pabaw ńßan pasajda i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ muŇčaŇču atu mi ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis a ¶a kuni ka ¶…ôbar~…ĺan nu bar~…ĺu, tamaan nu bar~…ĺuan i takur~…ĺaw nu tankuŇčaan, apuju ib…ôr~…ĺińß nu bar~…ĺu, bar~…ĺu nu akawaj satanaju Ē~ ° sa . kasibar~…ĺuan ńßan i sabaw tu ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺat katukuńß tu sakatusa a mińß ¶aan nu tur~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺadan. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: * *.) ńß…ô ¶i ńß…ô ¶i mańßida u mar~…ĺi sikabi, maduńß…ôm satu sumanańß. papańß mapur~…ĺuŇč i tatapaŇčan atu akawaj nu pabawan, kar~…ĺa mur~…ĺmur~…ĺan tu mamu ¶uja ku di ¶…ôm, r~…ĺaŇčdawaj ku kur~…ĺit atu kar~…ĺa kijuan ku sumanańß. nipar~…ĺumaan jadańß kuma ńßi ¶aaj nu r~…ĺaŇčawan, makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a bataan ku pina, mańßida u sumanańßaj ku r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu timjo, adidiaj nu sumanańßaj, r~…ĺaŇčdawaj nu papańßan a timjo, zi-*iannian-mu. (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam sa: .) u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj
